body.title: Igor.__init__ wires DatacenterClient with graceful no-datacenter fallback
body.result: Igor.__init__ wires DatacenterClient at end of __init__ (after _push_state_inventory). Build-to-intent: always tries to connect; absence is failure mode. Graceful fallback on any error. self.datacenter_client + self.datacenter_manifest exposed. 3 tests via Igor-shaped stub. TheIgors commit d1d4d47b.
body.description:
Slice 4 minimal — Igor reads its own manifest at boot. Igor.__init__ attempts to instantiate IMAPServer + DatacenterClient + announce(). On any failure (no daemon, missing profile, timeout), logs warning and sets self.datacenter_client = None; Igor continues without the manifest. Build-to-intent: no IGOR_*_ENABLED flag — Igor always tries to connect; absence is the failure mode, not a configuration switch.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/TheIgors/wild_igor/igor/main.py (Igor.__init__ adds 1 try-block ~20 lines), /home/akien/TheIgors/tests/test_igor_datacenter_boot.py (NEW — verifies graceful fallback + successful wire-up against in-process skeleton)
**Design rules:** never crash Igor when the datacenter is unavailable; manifest is optional context, not a load-bearing dependency in slice 4; no env-var gate.
**Scope boundary:** in — DatacenterClient instantiation in Igor.__init__, graceful failure mode, cache the client + manifest as Igor.datacenter_client and Igor.datacenter_manifest. Out — tool dispatch via manifest (slice 4b), peer advisor via manifest (slice 4b), inotify-driven re-announce (slice 3b), IDLE loop wakeup (slice 3b).
**Test plan:** test_igor_boots_without_datacenter (default — no skeleton running, datacenter_client=None, no exception); test_igor_boots_with_in_process_skeleton (boot a skeleton in-process with IMAP stub, Igor's __init__ wires client + receives manifest); test_igor_continues_when_announce_times_out (skeleton not running but IMAP stub up, timeout triggers fallback).
